techStack.heading: Tech Stack

jobs.title: Programmer
jobs.desc: Designed and implemented backend web applications using Django Rest Framework, Golang, Java Springboot, Flask, FastAPI and Nest Js.
achievements: Performed component upgrades and migration on KPEI’s e-CLEARS system using Java Spring Boot, ensuring compatibility with newer Spring Boot versions and Java 17+, and integrated updates within microservices architecture.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to enhance internal and external web applications.
Conducted data migrations to ensure seamless integration for new application implementations.
Partnered with developers to resolve technical issues and deliver new features effectively.
Developed low-code business applications using PowerApps to streamline workflows and enhance productivity.

jobs.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
jobs.desc: Delivered custom website development solutions, completing projects across various domains.
achievements: COMPLETED projects such as: Barber Queuing System, Skin Treatment Expert System, School E-Learning Platform, Tourist Booking Website.
Applied expertise in various technologies, ensuring high-quality results and client satisfaction.

jobs.title: Intern
jobs.desc: Innovation and Vocational Center that combines elements of science and technology development, market needs, industry and business.
achievements: Designed an information system for Soto Panaz, covering system architecture, database management, and user interface using PHP and Bootstrap.
Migrated the Solo Technopark & Solo Techno Incubator websites from WordPress to Node.js using Next.js, Express.js, and Tailwind CSS.
Conducted functional, integration, and performance testing while maintaining bug fixes for Soto Panaz, Solo Technopark, and Solo Techno Incubator.

degrees.description: Got a full scholarship for 4 years through test selection. Active in the Student Council Organization and event committees. Served as a practicum assistant for Data Communication Network and Web Programming.

certs.name: NestJS Zero to Hero - Modern TypeScript Back-end Development

items.title: E-learning School

phases.title: Planning & Strategy
phases.des: We'll collaborate to map out your website's goals, target audience, and key functionalities. We'll discuss things like site structure, navigation, and content requirements.

phases.title: Development & Progress Update
phases.des: Once we agree on the plan, I cue my lofi playlist and dive into coding. From initial sketches to polished code, I keep you updated every step of the way.

phases.title: Development & Launch
phases.des: This is where the magic happens! Based on the approved design, I'll translate everything into functional code, building your website from the ground up.
